name: FinancingTerm
description: A single available financing term option including APR and payment details.

amount.description: Purchase amount this term applies to, in cents.

loan_type.description: Type of financing loan (e.g., split_pay, installment).

apr.description: Annual percentage rate for this financing term.

installment_amount.description: Monthly installment payment amount in cents.

interest_amount.description: Total interest charged over the life of the loan in cents.

total_amount.description: Total amount paid including principal and interest, in cents.
